title: Capstone escrow deal
question: Should the payee be paid under the linked terms? (vote YES = pay the payee, NO = refund the payer)
terms: Deliver a working on-chain arbitration court on World Chain mainnet: a human registers through on-chain World ID 4.0, a case is drawn to a random panel, and the panel resolves it by private commit/reveal. Acceptance = the linked explorer trace shows a case resolved by the panel.
